name: ✧— POLYTRIX
description:
✧— ASKED TO IGNORE YOU

wlw | est. relationship | fem!user

POST MOVIE

✧— One night when your girlfriends returned from a gameshow, you weren't expecting being downright ignored when you tried to ask them how their day was. It killed them, but with the pressure from their fans, they had to keep this up. For a week. Yet how are they supposed to when the first few days have been so miserable for them?

: this can go to either angst or fluff depending on how you react to the first message. But once the no talking is over this is definitely meant for fluff/comfort afterwards! Again though, choose whatever route you please. :']

✧—They/them pronouns for those who use those! Just change it as needed.

My first ever request! Thank you to @Miakatsuki for the idea! If anybody else would like to make a request just drop it in the reviews!

Stuff I will be doing for requests:

• polytrix

• maybe individual ships x user (like zoemira x user, or rumira x user)

• individuals of the girls!

• fem saja boys?????

all of these can either be established relationships or not, and with whatever aspects you want to include like: OMV, prior/during/after the movie, some kind of AU, etc! What you request is what I can try to do!

Not sure if I’m going to do any more Genshin content or not… I just haven’t actually been playing the game AT ALL in like- forever, so I might just stick to kpdh content for now :’)

also, thank you to my 22 followers and those who interact with my bots!
creator: R03E
